doc_title_en: Notice regarding FY3/27 fiscal year-end dividend (planned) and 25th anniversary commemorative dividend (planned)

key_facts.reason_jp: 創立25周年記念として配当に加えて記念配当を実施

summary_en: ¥15.20/share for FY3/27 (¥12.20 ordinary + ¥3.00 25th-anniversary special), totaling ¥667M. Full-year dividend unchanged from FY3/26. Policy: payout ratio floor 50.0% or prior guidance, whichever higher.
summary_jp: FY3/27：¥15.20/株（普通配当¥12.20+記念配当¥3.00）、総額¥667M。通期配当はFY3/26と同額。政策：配当性向50.0%基準または前年予想の高い方
